certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No AI-specific risk assessment or impact assessment process documented
Missing transparency, explainability, and accountability mechanisms for decisions
Insufficient data governance and quality controls beyond basic GDPR flag
No performance monitoring, continual improvement, or internal audit provisions for the AI system
Escalation rules are static and lack dynamic AI oversight or human-in-the-loop validation
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk management framework per ISO 42001 Clause 6 including impact assessments
Add logging, audit trails, and explainability features for all automated decisions
Define AI objectives, competence requirements, and continual improvement processes
Integrate real-time compliance monitoring and bias/fairness checks into capabilities

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No AI-specific risk assessment or impact assessment process documented
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
